subcodes.first_line: O cherished maidservant of the Blessed Beauty! Despite the lack of time, your detailed letter was carefully read. Concerning the ascension [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز عزیز جمال مبارک نامه مفصل با وجود عدم فرصت بدقت مطالعه گردید از صعود
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @eulogies; reminiscences, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
